key_insights.insight: Mental health is heavily reliant on one's integration into a social structure, rather than solely on internal belief coherence.
key_insights.quote: And so your mental health is way more dependent on your nesting within a social structure than on your, say, the internal coherence of your belief systems.

key_insights.insight: The more self-conscious or focused on yourself you are, the more prone to suffering you become.
key_insights.quote: The more you think about yourself, the more miserable you are.

key_insights.insight: Positive emotions stem from tracking progress toward a goal.
key_insights.quote: Positive emotion is a consequence of evidence of movement towards a desired goal.

key_insights.insight: The 'divine' can be defined as the pinnacle of what is good, something always beyond reach, providing endless opportunity for growth.
key_insights.quote: God is the good towards which all goods point.

key_insights.insight: Telling the truth, even when it leads to hardship, is better than falsifying your speech, as the latter can be more damaging in the long run.
key_insights.quote: There's nothing worse that can happen to you than to falsify your speech.

key_insights.insight: Marriage requires a willingness to participate in a shared 'game' of self-improvement and mutual care.
key_insights.quote: That's really what the marital vow is in the final analysis most deeply is the willingness to participate in that game.

key_insights.insight: Focusing on what you can offer to others makes you more desirable than solely focusing on what you want.
key_insights.quote: The right question is, how can I learn to offer something to someone else that would make me eminently desirable?

key_insights.insight: Small, consistent steps towards improvement create exponential growth, while consistent retreat results in exponential decline.
key_insights.quote: You start going downhill, you go downhill faster and faster. Start going uphill, you go uphill faster and faster.

key_insights.insight: Pornography takes away the desperation that is needed for the romantic adventure of life.
key_insights.quote: To put you in a position where you're gonna have the romantic adventure of your life, the true romantic adventure of your life, you're going to need love and desperation, buddy.

actionable_advice.advice: If you are disagreeable, focus on doing good for others.
actionable_advice.how_to: Instead of strategizing to get what you want, focus on what you can do for other people or what you would do if you only did what was true and right.

actionable_advice.advice: Fortify your 'territory' so you can speak your mind freely.
actionable_advice.how_to: Diversify income streams and reduce dependencies on single sources of income or support.

actionable_advice.advice: Engage in weekly relationship maintenance with your partner.
actionable_advice.how_to: Dedicate 90 minutes each week to intentionally discuss needs, observations, and concerns within the relationship.

actionable_advice.advice: If you want to quit watching pornography, make a list of all the ways it is damaging your life.
actionable_advice.how_to: Make an exhaustive list of all the ways that pornography is hurting your life, and then make a list of what you want instead.

actionable_advice.advice: Set yourself a small goal each day to improve your life.
actionable_advice.how_to: Find some small thing that you could fix, that you would fix, no matter how small.

memorable_stories: Peterson shares anecdote of encountering "psychopathic journalists" who almost destroyed his family and career.
Peterson shares how he knew that hell was the dominion of the lie around 1985 by reading Solzhenitsyn and Carl Jung.
Peterson shares that he doesn't have a single negative memory of his mother.
contrarian_claims: Living together before marriage increases the likelihood of divorce.
Modern liberalism is failing because its underlying Judeo-Christian foundation has become shaky.
Self-esteem is a pathological concept that doesn't exist
The best predictor of future behavior is past behavior
You can't create your own values because values are real.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Jordan B Peterson: You Need To Listen To Your Wife! We've Built A Lonely & Sexless Society! If You & Your Partner Do This, You'll Divorce!
